text: Fertilizer Subsidy: Urea. ₹1,63,000 crore FY24. Maximum Retail Price fixed at ₹242/45kg bag. Government bears 75% of cost. Neem coating mandatory since 2015. Production: 31.4 MT. Import: 9 MT. Subsidy via DBT to companies.

Fertilizer Subsidy: NBS for P&K fertilizers. ₹40,000 crore FY24. DAP, MOP, SSP, NPK compounds. DAP MRP fixed at ₹1,350/bag (≈₹3,500 actual cost). Government absorbs difference. Promotes balanced fertilization.

Fertilizer/Pharma: PM Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana. 12,000+ Janaushadhi Kendras. Generic medicines at 50-90% cheaper. Sales: ₹1,000 crore+ annually. Saving ₹28,000 crore for citizens. Target: 25,000 kendras.

Fertilizer: Nano Urea by IFFCO. ₹225/500ml bottle (replaces 1 bag of urea). 36 crore bottles sold. 8 plants operational. Reduces fertilizer use by 50%. Carbon footprint reduction. Promotes precision agriculture.
